description: Configure release signing for the 'WeatherApp' Android project. Generate a keystore at '~/AndroidStudioProjects/WeatherApp/release-keystore.jks' with password 'Release2024!', key alias 'weather-release-key', key password 'Release2024!', and certificate details (CN='Weather App Team', O='CloudView Inc', L='San Francisco', ST='California', C='US', Validity: 10000 days). Configure the 'app/build.gradle.kts' file to include a 'release' signing configuration using this keystore, apply it to the 'release' build type, and set isMinifyEnabled to false. Build a signed release APK and create a report file 'signing_report.txt' in the project root containing the absolute path to the keystore on line 1, the key alias on line 2, and the absolute path to the generated release APK on line 3.
